_help: Copy this file to lantern.config.json (gitignored) and fill it in. These are the per-install infra knobs — your OWN deployed worker URLs, where the album saves on disk, optional Cloudflare account id and Discord channels. Secrets (the gate secret, API tokens) go in .lantern-secrets.json, NOT here.

discord._note: The bot TOKEN is a secret — put it in .lantern-secrets.json as discordBotToken. Here, just list the channel IDs the companion's Ears may listen in.
